sys_script_client.description: 2.6 - fix Respond Clarification Request Header - localize all headers 2.5.317 STRY0088787 - MODALS - (Portal/Platform) Task form Save Confirmation Message displays when updating task form before selecting an UI Modal

sys_script_client.name: Task - onSubmit Open Request Modal
